These claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first three digits 
are (“D1A,” “D1B,” “D1C,” “D1D,” “D1E,” or “D1F”). The total Primary Payer Payments are calculated as 
the sum of the LINE_BENE_PRMRY_PYR_PD_AMT.
